flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Syracuse University rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($30.0k → $34.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Syracuse University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($57.6k → $65.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Syracuse University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
